title: Recycle Rotten Meat
description: A mod that allows us to turn rotten flesh dropped by zombies in Minecraft into leather by heating it.
body:
# Rotten Meat İnto Leather
A mod that allows us to turn rotten flesh dropped by zombies in Minecraft into leather by heating it.
- You can bake it in a smoke oven or over a campfire.![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fdce153e82f9423ee6767a325d52b882fdf2378.png)![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ee80301d055de9eca8d2b3737260d62a445ecbd.png)![fdg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d3a4eecc5c0c25c171a3ed6f005e9327986bfd6.png)
